# Button
The core button primitive with variants, sizes, and disabled states.
## Import
```tsx
import { /* see source */ } from "@/components/ui/button";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Component variant="default" size="default" disabled={false}>Test Me</Component>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"Test Me"`: Label
- **variant** (string) — default: `"default"`: Variant
- **size** (string) — default: `"default"`: Size
- **disabled** (boolean) — default: `false`: Disabled
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add button
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/button
```
